remotes.fairydreaming: fairydreaming/llama.cpp (PR #21149 source — read-only, do not push)
remotes.antirez: antirez/llama.cpp-deepseek-v4-flash (V4 source — read-only, do not push)
remotes.mine: cchuter/llama.cpp (our fork — push freely, including master)

push_policy.reason: Push to mine (cchuter/llama.cpp) is fine, including merging into mine/master. The line is origin (ggml-org/llama.cpp upstream) — never push there and never `gh pr create` against upstream until explicitly enabled.

iteration_budget.rationale: Generous iteration budget — encourages persistence on hard problems. Hard cap before needs-human is 8+8.

notes: Goal: port antirez's V4 inference support onto fairydreaming's V3.2/DSA base. Spec: docs/superpowers/specs/2026-05-04-v4-port-overnight-design.md. Plan: docs/superpowers/plans/2026-05-04-v4-port-overnight.md.
Antirez's 6 V4 commits to port: 06c504247, 188df615c, b67f5db5c, 57c4283b5, 2f2d44052, 3ba61fbb4 — in dependency order.
Validation gates live in tests/v4-port/. Stream E (validation harness) is built first.
DSA Metal kernels are PUNTED (V3.2 won't run on Metal in our build — V4 will).
CUDA is IGNORED tonight. CPU + Metal only.
Tasks executed in dependency order: E → A → B → C → D → F.
